---
title: "MOSuite-Galaxy"
format: gfm
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.qmd. Please edit that file -->

{{< include docs/_intro.qmd >}}

{{< include docs/_help.qmd >}}

## Updating the Galaxy XML files for MOSuite

### Installation

```bash
pip install git+https://github.com/CCBR/MOSuite-Galaxy
```

### Usage

```bash
galaxysynth --help
```
```{python}
#| echo: false
!galaxysynth --help
```

```bash
galaxysynth  "templates/2_blueprints/*.json" \
    --docker nciccbr/mosuite:v0.3.0 \
    --output templates/3_galaxy-tools
```

### Developer notes

- Please view the [contributing guide](.github/CONTRIBUTING.md) before opening a pull request.
- Galaxy Tool XML documentation: <https://docs.galaxyproject.org/en/master/dev/schema.html>
